rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CARL F. WENTE et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions To Trustee And For Order Modifying Order Dated August 26,2010
rulings.Rulings: continued by the court to march 21, 2016. per email sent to petitioning attorney on 3/1/16 at 1:45 p.m., the court requires petitioners provide a file stamped hard copy of the petition 3 court days prior to the hearing. no courtesy copy was received as of 12:30 p.m. on Thursday, March 3, 2016, 2 court days prior to the hearing. new deadline for providing a courtesy copy to avoid an automatic continuance is wednesday, march 16, 2016. further, it is noted there is no POS on file for the NOH form. Judicial Council form DE-120 is a mandatory form of notice for petitions in probate involving a trust. notice of that form is required unless waived.
